items.title: India cracks down on satirists for turning its prime minister into a punch line
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'It's a special thing to be on Planet Earth': Artemis crew welcomed home in Houston
items.dek: The four astronauts flew around the Moon in a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans in history.
items.body: The four astronauts flew around the Moon in a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans in history.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Germany's far-right AfD adopts 'radical' manifesto ahead of key polls
items.dek: The far-right party is riding high in the opinion polls in the eastern state of Saxony-Anhalt.
items.body: The far-right party is riding high in the opinion polls in the eastern state of Saxony-Anhalt.
